description: CompositionWhite, blue and green printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, round neck, embroidery and sequins on the chest, two rose shaped buttons and a vented hemFitRegularWash careDry clean onlyThis kurta by diva is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5’8” and chest 33”
